nasb.text: They *said to Him, “Why then did Moses command to give her a certificate of divorce and send  her  away?”

esv.text: They said to him, “Why then did Moses command one to give a certificate of divorce and to send her away?”

cnv.text: 他們就問：“為甚麼摩西卻吩咐‘人若給了休書，就可以休妻’呢？”

ccb.text: 他们追问：“那么，为什么摩西说，只要给妻子休书，就可以休她呢？”

csbs.text: 他们问耶稣：“那么，为什么摩西吩咐说，给一份休书，就可以休妻呢？”
